plugins.name: mobile-cc defaults
plugins.description: Seeds the first-visit active view + theme + default claude pane. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Auto-fit
plugins.description: Triggers core auto-fit on load + pane switch so the terminal fits a narrow phone instead of clipping. Respects autofit-off. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: mobile-cc logo
plugins.description: Header logo glyph + task-switcher title. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Commands
plugins.description: One-tap command chips (sends command + Enter). Seeded with ▶ cc → ccpc; editable in Settings → Commands. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Quick Keys
plugins.description: Editable special-key buttons (Esc/Tab/arrows/Ctrl-*) above the Message box. Manage the list in Settings → Quick Keys; Ctrl-L dropped from the default seed. Replaces upstream ttyview-quickkeys. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: New Tab
plugins.description: Header ＋ button → menu to create a session: blank shell, shell + Claude Code, or Claude Code in a chosen project folder (grouped). Launch command configurable in Settings → New Tab. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Session Summary
plugins.description: Header 📋 → per-session AI summary (about + what happened). On-demand + cached (~/.cache/mobile-cc/topics) via /api/cc-session-summary; Groq BYO key. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Tab Menu
plugins.description: Per-tab manage menu (Rename/Kill). Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Tab Color Sync
plugins.description: Polls /api/state for agent-set tab marks (the pink/green long-press line) and applies them live via window.ttvTabsSetMark — no reload. Set marks with the mcc-tab-color helper. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Keyboard Overlay
plugins.description: Makes the soft keyboard overlay the page (VirtualKeyboard API) instead of resizing the viewport, so opening it no longer bumps the view; lifts the input cluster above it. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Terminal Size
plugins.description: Header disclosure popover to set terminal height by resizing the tmux pane's row count (own-WS resize); groups relocated font controls + Rows −/+/reset. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Desktop Width
plugins.description: Comfortable adjustable centered terminal width on desktop (default 90 cols) + composer/tab alignment + submit-path diagnostics. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Pinch Zoom
plugins.description: Pinch to zoom the terminal area. Settings → Pinch Zoom: Sharp (font-size, crisp + pan) / Smooth (CSS transform scale + pan) / Off. Purely visual, no tmux resize. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Scrollback
plugins.description: Settings → Scrollback: slider/presets for how many history lines load when a pane opens (writes ttv-scrollback-rows; daemon retains up to 10000). Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Session Search
plugins.description: 🔍 header button: search all CC sessions (/api/cc-search, ripgrep) ranked by keyword+recency, with a parallel opt-in Groq AI pick. Jump to open tabs, preview/reopen closed sessions. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Tab Enhancements
plugins.description: Tall two-line tabs (readable name + subtitle/tag) via body.ttv-tall-tabs; hosts AI subtitle generation (window.ttvTagSuggest, Groq). Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Tab Topics
plugins.description: Tab subtitle 'Recent topic' source + a scrollable 'Recent topics' section in the tab ⋮ menu. AI summaries via Groq (BYO key), data from /api/cc-session-turns. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Last Screenshot
plugins.description: Native-shell only: one-tap chip that reads the device's newest Screenshots-bucket image via the Capacitor LastScreenshot plugin and attaches it through the image-paste pipeline. No-op in a plain browser. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Path & URL Actions
plugins.description: Linkifies file paths + URLs in the terminal; a short tap opens an action menu — Copy always, Download for paths (/api/download, $HOME-allowlisted), Open for URLs (always the external/default browser: native ACTION_VIEW, PWA new tab). Long-press still selects for native Copy. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: CC Markers
plugins.description: Shared scanner (window.mccMarkers): CC '❯'/'●' marker rows + chrome boundary. Used by Prompt Nav + Message Regions. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Prompt Nav
plugins.description: Jump between your own prompts in the terminal: detects CC's '❯ ' user-prompt marker rows and a floating ▲/▼ control scrolls to prev/next with an N/M pill + highlight. Excludes the live input box. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Message Regions
plugins.description: Pseudo message-containers in the terminal: correlates CC JSONL turns to row ranges; user/assistant tint + turn separators + per-turn 'when sent' timestamp. Settings → Message Regions (default ON). Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Notifications
plugins.description: Web Push opt-in (Settings → Notifications): phone buzzes on CC permission prompts (always) + pane idle-after-activity (opt-in). Asks permission only on tap; subscribes via /api/push/* (VAPID, src/push.rs). Also handles notification→tap→focus-pane deep links (?pane=). Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Keyboard Diagnostic
plugins.description: TEMP diagnostic: traces editable-element focus + soft-keyboard viewport changes vs tab switches; ships to diag.jsonl. Remove once the tab-switch keyboard bug is pinned.

plugins.name: Pane Picker
plugins.description: Bundled in mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Display Toggles
plugins.description: Bundled in mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Claude Code
plugins.description: Bundled in mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Pinned Tabs
plugins.description: Bundled in mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Image Paste
plugins.description: Bundled in mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Voice Input
plugins.description: Bundled in mobile-cc. Web Speech by default; Groq Whisper + LLM cleanup with a BYO key. Add a Deepgram key for real-time streaming preview (works on Android) while Groq produces the final transcript (Settings → Voice Input).

plugins.name: Reload App
plugins.description: Bundled in mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Client Logs
plugins.description: Bundled in mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Session Manager
plugins.description: Bundled in mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Terminal Green
plugins.description: Bundled in mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Live Sync
plugins.description: Bundled in mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Light
plugins.description: Bundled in mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Tap to focus
plugins.description: Click the terminal to focus the Message box, with a brief focus-pulse. Desktop-mouse only. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Draft Keeper
plugins.description: Persists a typed-but-unsent Message across reloads/restarts: saves the input per-session to localStorage (debounced), restores into an empty box, clears on confirmed send. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Desktop keyboard passthrough
plugins.description: Click the terminal on desktop to type straight into the active pane (physical keyboard). Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Command palette
plugins.description: Mobile entry button + mobile overlay restyle + populated zero-arg commands (Go to <session>, Run <chip>, scrollback/font). Slice 1 of the act-bar. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Ask AI
plugins.description: NL command router (Ask AI…) — Groq llama-3.3-70b browser-direct, reuses STT key. Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Scroll memory
plugins.description: Keeps the terminal pinned to the tail across reload — re-asserts bottom after auto-fit + deep-scrollback reflow (gesture-guarded, follow-mode panes only). Internal to mobile-cc.

plugins.name: Toolbar
plugins.description: Declutters the top bar: an ⋯ expand button collapses secondary controls into a dropdown; Settings → Toolbar chooses which stay pinned (default: pane picker + settings). Internal to mobile-cc.
